actions.name: Set maximum
actions.description: Set the maximum value that can be chosen from the slider bar.

actions.name: Set minimum
actions.description: Set the minimum value that can be chosen from the slider bar.

actions.name: Set step
actions.description: Set the increment step of the slider bar.

actions.name: Set tooltip
actions.description: Set the tooltip that appears when the mouse hovers over the slider bar.

actions.name: Set value
actions.description: Set the currently selected value of the slider bar. This must be between the currently set minimum and maximum values.

conditions.name: Compare value
conditions.description: Compare the currently chosen value from the slider bar.

conditions.name: On changed
conditions.description: Triggered when the user finishes changing the chosen value on the slider bar. Typically this only triggers when the user releases a mouse button or touch after moving the slider.

conditions.name: On changing
conditions.description: Triggered repeatedly as the user changes the chosen value on the slider bar. Unlike On changed this will reflect the current value of the slider as the user is still dragging it.

conditions.name: On clicked
conditions.description: Triggered when the user clicks the slider bar.

expressions.name: Maximum
expressions.description: Return the currently set maximum slider value.

expressions.name: Minimum
expressions.description: Return the currently set minimum slider value.

expressions.name: Step
expressions.description: Return the currently set slider step value (increment).

expressions.name: Value
expressions.description: Return the current value chosen by the user, between the minimum and maximum values.
